definition:
μαθητεύω
 (μαθητής), 
  1. intrans. (as prop. vb. in -εύω, and so Plut., mor. 837 with and elsew.), to be a disciple: with dative, Mat.27:57 (Rec., WH, mg.). 
   2. Trans., to make a disciple: with accusative, Mat.28:19, Act.14:21; pass., before dative, τ. Ἰησοῦ, Mat.27:57 (WH, R); τ. βασιλείᾳ, Mat.13:52.†
 (AS)
